final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: game-concept-art
Asset type: AAA game key art, cinematic scene
Primary request: epic fantasy dragon lair inside an active volcano, ancient dragon perched on a mountain of gold and treasure
Scene/backdrop: volcanic lava cavern interior, molten rock flowing down walls, distant cave entrance with moonlight streaming in
Subject: colossal ancient dragon with deep red and black interwoven scales, wings spread wide dominating the cavern space, eyes emitting intense golden glow
Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, professional concept art quality
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, dramatic perspective emphasizing dragon's massive scale against treasure hoard
Lighting/mood: complex interplay of warm orange-red lava glow on scales, cool moonlight from entrance, epic and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson, orange-gold, black, with cool blue-white moonlight accent
Materials/textures: realistic iridescent dragon scales, molten rock, gleaming gold coins, ancient armor, glowing magical gems
Constraints: maintain the dragon as dominant focal point, preserve the warm-cool light contrast, keep D&D fantasy aesthetic
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, flat lighting, plastic-looking scales, cluttered composition, deformed anatomy, watermark
